title: Defiance Nasdaq 100 LightningSpread Income ETF declares $0.1521 dividend
content:
* Defiance Nasdaq 100 LightningSpread Income ETF (QLDY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/QLDY]) declares $0.1521/share bi-weekly dividend [https://www.defianceetfs.com/qldy/].
 	* Payable April 9; for shareholders of record April 8; ex-div April 8.
 	* See QLDY Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/QLDY/dividends?source=news_bullet]
